description: The WorldSwitcher component is legacy content for switching worlds via rotating the wrist.

fields.Show: Whether the switcher should be shown.
fields.IgnoreTouchesFrom: A slot to ignore touch events from. like the hand it is on.
fields._repulsionTree: The repulsion tree used to arrange the orbs in the menu.
fields._linesMesh: A multi segment mesh used to create the selection and indication visuals.
fields._slider: The slider used as part of the selection menu.
fields._centerOrb: The center orb that moves the rest of the orbs to places around it.
fields._visualRoot: The root slot for all the visuals of the switcher.

methods.WorldOrbTouched: Handles when a world orb is touched for switching to it.
methods.WorldOrbLongPressed: Handles when a world orb is long touched to bring up options.

usage: Can be brought up through the legacy world switcher option in the legacy settings options.
